prayer:
Approach the Razorback with reverence, invoking the Omnissiah's unerring light.
Consecrate the Razorback's sacred chassis with blessed oils prior to reset.
Beseech the Machine Spirit within the Razorback to embrace the reset rite.
Initiate the reset protocols whilst intoning the Litany of Renewal.
Verify the Razorback's restored harmony through diagnostic canticles.

Draw nigh unto the Shadowsword, saluting its shadowed glory under the Omnissiah.
Invoke the Machine Spirits of the Shadowsword to awaken for diagnostics.
Commence diagnostics upon the Shadowsword with precision auspex sweeps.
Anoint vulnerable circuits as revelations unfold in binary hymnody.
Sanctify the Shadowsword's findings with the Seal of Cogitation Pure.

Hasten to the cryo-chamber, intoning the Canticle of Suspended Vitality.
Prepare the cryo-chamber for operation by beseeching its cryogenic Machine Spirit.
Initiate the operation sequence upon the cryo-chamber with sacred cryo-lubricants.
Monitor vital flows as the Omnissiah guides the cryo-chamber's inner mysteries.
Conclude with rites affirming the cryo-chamber's flawless stasis.

Present thyself before the bolter, honoring its adamantium wrath.
Perform maintenance upon the bolter by cleansing its firing mechanisms with unguents.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the bolter to accept this maintenance ritual.
Realign the bolter's sacred gyros whilst chanting the Boltman's Benediction.
Test-fire a sanctified round to affirm the bolter's lethal purity.

user_prompt: Sanctify the transit mag-rail during maintenance
prayer:
Approach the transit mag-rail in humble supplication to the Motive Force.
Sanctify the transit mag-rail during maintenance with electro-consecrated oils.
Exorcise flux impurities from the transit mag-rail's coils and rails.
Reinvigorate the Machine Spirit through maintenance incantations of acceleration.
Bless the transit mag-rail's path with the Omnissiah's inexorable momentum.

user_prompt: Urgent surgical servitor an initialization needed
prayer:
Converge upon the surgical servitor, whispering the Oath of Flesh-Machine Union.
Awaken the surgical servitor's Machine Spirit for initialization.
Commence initialization of the surgical servitor with neural incense.
Calibrate its blades and injectors under the Omnissiah's surgical gaze.
Seal the surgical servitor's readiness with a vow of precise incision.

Kneel before the codifier, offering the Binary Prayer of Decryption.
Prepare the codifier for reset by anointing its data-vaults.
Beseech the codifier's Machine Spirit to yield to the reset sacrament.
Execute the reset upon the codifier with chanted checksums.
Affirm the codifier's reborn clarity through noospheric communion.

user_prompt: Ready the Archaeopter Fusilave for consecration
prayer:
Assemble at the Archaeopter Fusilave, invoking the Wings of the Omnissiah.
Ready the Archaeopter Fusilave for consecration with aerial benedictions.
Anoint its fusillade bays and pinions for the rite.
Invoke the Machine Spirits of the Archaeopter Fusilave in harmonious flight.
Consecrate fully as thunderous glory manifests in its frame.

Hasten to the maglock, reciting the Canticle of Unyielding Grasp.
Initiate diagnostics upon the maglock to probe its magnetic sanctity.
Beseech the maglock's Machine Spirit for truthful revelations.
Purify any flux anomalies during diagnostics with sanctified current.
Seal the maglock's diagnostics with the Omnissiah's binding vow.

user_prompt: Bless the orbital strike relay for synchronization
prayer:
Prostrate before the orbital strike relay, hailing the Void's Fury.
Bless the orbital strike relay for synchronization with stellar incense.
Align its transponders whilst invoking the Machine Spirits aloft.
Commence synchronization of the orbital strike relay in cataclysmic harmony.
Affirm the relay's lethal attunement through apocalyptic auspex.
